data.title: Write structural-boundary tests for brainstorm Phase 2 contradiction gate
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation Notes
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh to validate structural contracts of the brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 2 External Dependencies Contradiction Gate section.

This is a structural-boundary test per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5 — the artifact under test (brainstorm/SKILL.md) is a non-executable LLM instruction file. Tests MUST target the structural boundary (section headings as interface contracts, referential integrity), NOT content assertions or existence-only checks.

### Test approach (Given/When/Then)
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md is read
- When: the file is parsed for the Phase 2 External Dependencies Contradiction Gate structural markers
- Then: the required gate sub-section heading exists at the correct location (after the HARD-GATE directive in Phase 2 Step 4), confirming the gate was inserted

### Tests to write:
- test_contradiction_gate_section_heading_present: Assert that the Phase 2 Approval Gate section of SKILL.md contains a structural heading for the External Dependencies Contradiction Gate block. Use grep for the heading text — this is a structural contract boundary, not a content assertion.
- test_token_marker_propagation_section_present: Assert that the SKILL.md contains a marker for confirmation_token_required propagation in the contradiction gate section.
- test_flag_guard_present: Assert that the contradiction gate section references planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag (flag-gating contract).

### .test-index RED markers required
Add RED markers for this test file against plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md:
  plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh [test_contradiction_gate_section_heading_present]

### TDD requirement
Write these tests FIRST. They will fail (RED) because the contradiction gate section does not yet exist in SKILL.md. Tasks 2 and 3 will make them pass (GREEN).

### Exemption: Unit test exemption does NOT apply here — this task writes the RED test itself.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — or targeted test confirms RED before Task 3
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_contradiction_gate_section_heading_present function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_contradiction_gate_section_heading_present' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_token_marker_propagation_section_present function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_token_marker_propagation_section_present' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_flag_guard_present function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_flag_guard_present' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh
- [ ] Tests are behavioral (structural contract boundary, NOT existence-only or content-grepping): each test greps for a section heading or structural marker, not a specific wording of the instruction content
  Verify: manual review — test approach in task description describes structural heading assertions
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_contradiction_gate_section_heading_present] for plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_contradiction_gate_section_heading_present\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Running tests returns non-zero exit before SKILL.md amendment (confirming RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
